name: leetcode-workflow
description: Claude Code-native LeetCode practice tracker. Seven slash commands scaffold problems, time solves, classify patterns, and surface what to retry — backed by a SQLite practice repo with five generated Markdown views (progress, timings, retry, patterns coverage, history). Mostly deterministic Python; Claude is invoked only where reasoning is needed (problem suggestion, pattern classification, body stripping), keeping token cost low. Pedagogical contract enforced: hints, never solutions.
